findings.evidence: BernsteinMeasures.lean:158-160 has the extra `L`/`hL` while the conclusion is only `IntegrableOn`; Limits.lean:35-36 proves `IsCompletelyMonotone.tendsto_atTop : ∃ L, Tendsto f atTop (nhds L) ∧ 0 ≤ L`.
findings.fix: State the public lemma as `(hcm : IsCompletelyMonotone f) : IntegrableOn ...`, obtain `⟨L, hL, _⟩ := hcm.tendsto_atTop` internally, and keep the `hL`-parameterized proof as private if useful.
findings.issue: `IsCompletelyMonotone.neg_deriv_integrableOn` requires `{L : ℝ} (hL : Tendsto f atTop (nhds L))`, but `L` does not appear in the conclusion, so every caller must supply an automatic fact.

summary: One public integrability lemma is stated with an unnecessary external limit witness even though this PR proves that completely monotone functions have such a limit automatically.
